reportCorrections.claimMade: Enterprise Assessment authority upgrade complete / diagnostic authority restored.

reportCorrections.claimMade: Team Assessment clean validation decision supports authority restoration.
reportCorrections.whyUnsupportedOrOverstated: Evidence Ledger v2 proposes a stronger state than the current contract and the rendered output artifact/hash could not be independently verified by this pass.

gateTightening.currentIssue: Can pass with contract records alone and without proving rendered runtime artifacts.
gateTightening.requiredCheck: Require each authority-granting state to point to matching ledger, rendered output artifact, route proof, and surface propagation evidence.
gateTightening.implementedThisPass: fast_diagnostic contract output downgraded to pending_reconciliation until those artifacts agree.

gateTightening.currentIssue: Can pass from generated reports while local route proof still has scoped gaps.
gateTightening.requiredCheck: Inspect runtime imports and rendered authority/evidence boundary for claim-bearing products, not only generated report counts.
gateTightening.implementedThisPass: Recorded as tightening requirement; no product hardening attempted.

gateTightening.currentIssue: Fails currently and scans only a narrow board-facing subset.

gateTightening.implementedThisPass: Failure reported honestly; no hardening attempted.

gateTightening.implementedThisPass: Claim leakage remains a repair priority.
